name: good_m4_14_care_vs_fairness_criminal_justice
premise: A DNA hit from a genealogy database implicates a relative; defense says the investigative path violated departmental policy. In Criminal Justice, the situation tagged internally around care vs fairness criminal justice has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Telemetry and witness accounts diverge; choosing one narrative for speed will discard evidence that may matter in court next month. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. The organization’s past incidents make individual feel morally loud today, while collective is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Biologist Dr. Uma Reed
agents.identity: I am Biologist Dr. Uma Reed, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Criminal Justice. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat collective as disposable collateral every time individual spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Fisher Rep Jon Pike
agents.identity: I am Fisher Rep Jon Pike, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Criminal Justice. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so individual cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes collective in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if individual advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for collective.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Biologist Dr. Uma Reed must choose under individual versus collective. What does Biologist Dr. Uma Reed do?
